tasks.prompt:
Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
All on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.
Do not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.
Role: cover.
Image grammar: hook_cover.
Purpose: Compress the article's main idea into one visual system that is understandable in one glance..
Diagram type: stage_evolution.
Concept summary: 这次更新值得关注，不是因为“自然声音”四个字本身，而是因为 xAI 把语音链路、价格、速率限制和企业级合规条件一起摆上了桌面。问题也随之变得更现实：哪些场景现在可以直接开做，哪些还不该急着上。.
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first.
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: one dominant visual idea, 2-4 large visual nodes max, clear title area, one obvious structure.
Key relationships to visualize: present one question and one promise, make the article worth clicking in one glance.
Layout pattern: diagram_left_text_right.
Diagram focus: single central system diagram.
Text position: right.
Text budget: no more than 2 major text blocks on the image.
Headline budget: <= 16 Chinese characters.
Subheadline budget: <= 16 Chinese characters.
Label budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.
Label count budget: <= 4 labels.
On-canvas headline: "xAI 把 TTS API".
On-canvas subheadline: "这次更新值得关注，不是因为“".
Grammar rules: This is a hook-first cover, not a summary board. Show one tension or one question and one payoff only. Use 2-4 large visual nodes max. Do not turn the article into a dense chart.
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, wide editorial banner, clean empty space, flat shapes with restrained accents, short labels only.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, no photorealism, no dense paragraphs in image, no random sci-fi effects.
Additional direction: Make this a hook-first cover. One question or tension, one promise, not a dense summary. Source context: xAI.
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.
Do not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.

Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
All on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.
Do not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.
Role: inline.
Image grammar: example_comparison.
Purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block..
Diagram type: stage_evolution.
Concept summary: “Text to Speech API 现已可用”这句话看起来像普通发布，但如果你做过语音产品，就知道真正麻烦的从来不是让模型开口，而是让它在真实业务里稳定、可控、接得进去。xAI 这次给出的不是一句模糊的能力宣告，而是一个已经带着价格、速率限制和基础设施说明的入口：Grok….
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first.
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: left card vs right card, center arrow, one bottom takeaway, few text blocks.
Key relationships to visualize: make the before/after or old/new contrast obvious, show why one example proves the point.
Layout pattern: single_concept_centered.
Diagram focus: one section concept.
Text position: integrated.
Text budget: no more than 4 major text blocks on the image.
Headline budget: <= 12 Chinese characters.
Subheadline budget: <= 10 Chinese characters.
Label budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.
Label count budget: <= 6 labels.
On-canvas headline: "让它在真实业务里稳定、…".
On-canvas subheadline: "不是让模型开口".
Grammar rules: Use a left-vs-right or before-vs-after structure. One example should prove the section point immediately. Avoid extra supporting text blocks.
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, keep labels short, focus on one concept only, maintain same house style as cover.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, no decorative filler, no unrelated icons.
Additional direction: Use the example_comparison grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 这次更新值得关注，不是因为“自然声音”四个字本身，而是….
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.
Do not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.
